plugins.name: cc-tts
plugins.description: Text-to-speech for Claude Code. Reads assistant responses aloud using edge-tts.

plugins.name: macnotify
plugins.description: macOS notifications for Claude Code events: response complete and permission requests.

plugins.name: claude-hud
plugins.description: Real-time statusline showing context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress. Always visible below your input, zero config required.
